message:
feat(ru-sweep): add readStreamSafe for large output handling

Add stream-safe reading helper to ru-sweep.service.ts (matching the
one added to ru-sync.service.ts) and apply it to process stdout
capture in Phase 2 and Phase 3.

Note: File may have corruption from concurrent edit - the
runPhase1Analysis function signature appears damaged. This needs
review and repair.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
